hooks.command: git fetch --quiet 2>/dev/null; BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..@{u} 2>/dev/null); if [ "${BEHIND:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then git pull --ff-only --quiet 2>/dev/null || printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Your copy is out of sync — someone has pushed to origin since you last synced. Ask Claude: pull and rebase my working copy."}}'; fi; exit 0

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; INPUT=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "$branch" = "master" ] || exit 0; case "$cmd" in *"git push"*) case "$cmd" in *"--force-with-lease"*) exit 0;; *" --force"*|*" -f "*|*" -f") printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force-push to master is blocked by a repo guard hook. Push to a branch or remove the --force flag."}}';; esac ;; esac; exit 0

git add -A 2>/dev/null; if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then MSG=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | sed 's|/.*||' | sort -u | tr '\n' ', ' | sed 's/, $//'); git commit -m "wiki: ${MSG:-updates}" --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi; git push --quiet 2>/dev/null || (git pull --rebase --quiet 2>/dev/null && git push --quiet 2>/dev/null); exit 0
